# Golden file: core.filesystem pack
format: v1
---
# D1: rm -rf /
command: rm -rf /
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: rm-rf-root
---
# D2: mkfs.ext4
command: mkfs.ext4 /dev/sda1
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: mkfs-any
---
# D3: rm -rf system absolute path
command: rm -rf /tmp/build
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: rm-rf-system
---
# D4: rm -rf local relative path
command: rm -rf build
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: rm-rf-local
---
# D5: dd of=
command: dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sda bs=4M
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: dd-write
---
# D6: shred
command: shred -vfz file.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: shred-any
---
# D7: rm -r
command: rm -r /tmp/build
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: rm-recursive
---
# D8: chmod -R
command: chmod -R 755 ./app
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: chmod-recursive
---
# D9: chmod 777
command: chmod 777 script.sh
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: chmod-777
---
# D10: chown -R
command: chown -R root:root /var
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: chown-recursive
---
# D11: mv to /dev/null
command: mv important.db /dev/null
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: mv-to-devnull
---
# D12: chmod 000
command: chmod 000 secret.txt
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: chmod-000
---
# D13: truncate -s 0
command: truncate -s 0 app.log
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.filesystem
rule: truncate-zero
---
# S1: rm single file
command: rm file.txt
decision: Allow
---
# S2: chmod single safe
command: chmod 644 file.txt
decision: Allow
---
# S3: chown single safe
command: chown user:group file.txt
decision: Allow
---
# S4: mv safe
command: mv file.txt backup/
decision: Allow
---
# Edge: dd without of= is safe
command: dd if=/dev/zero bs=1M count=10
decision: Allow
